name: /quotes empty state for a brand-new user
description: User has no quotes yet. /quotes shouldn't just show empty columns — it should illustrate the pipeline and offer a 'Draft your first quote' CTA pointing at /assistant.

persona.name: Marcus Lee
persona.context: Curious what /quotes will look like once he has some.

steps.expect: Empty state with the 4 stages shown as a faded/illustrated track and a primary CTA 'Draft your first quote'

steps.action: Returns to /quotes after creating one quote
steps.expect: Empty state replaced by the actual pipeline view with the new card visible

evaluationCriteria.check: Empty state has the same visual language as the populated view, not a totally different page
User isn't told what they're missing — they're shown what's possible
After first quote, the empty state never re-appears (no cache where empty UI flashes between renders)
CTA is a real button/link with a descriptive accessible name
